features.title: Digital Literacy Programs
features.description: Hands-on curriculum designed for beginners of all ages — teaching AI fundamentals, critical thinking in a digital world, and practical tools for everyday empowerment. Delivered in community centers, libraries, and online.

features.title: Community AI Access
features.description: We provide free access to HeadyBuddy and core Heady™ tools for verified community organizations, schools, and nonprofits. No paywalls. No conditions. Just intelligence made accessible.

features.title: Youth Coding Pipeline
features.description: A structured coding and AI track for youth ages 12–22 — from first lines of code to building real AI-powered projects. Mentorship, scholarships, and internship pathways included.

features.title: Underserved Communities
features.description: Our programs specifically target communities with limited access to technology education — rural areas, low-income neighborhoods, and minority-serving institutions — with culturally relevant, accessible content.

features.title: Transparent Impact
features.description: Every donation is publicly tracked. We publish quarterly impact reports showing exactly how funds are used, how many people we reached, and what outcomes we measured. Accountability is baked into our DNA.

features.title: Open Source Commitment
features.description: HeadyConnection releases all educational materials, program curricula, and community tools under open licenses. Everything we build for communities is freely available for any organization to use and adapt.
